extensions.noReadme: No README has been published for this extension yet.
extensions.noVersions: No versions have been published yet. Version history will appear here once a release ships.

empty.hintAdjust: Try a different search or relax some filters.
empty.hintCheckBack: New extensions land here as the marketplace grows.

errorBoundary.title: Couldn't load extensions
errorBoundary.body: We hit a snag reaching the marketplace. This is usually temporary — try again in a moment.

generic.title: Something went wrong
generic.body: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again — if it keeps happening, share the code below with support.

detail.emptyReadme: No README has been published for this extension yet.
detail.emptyReviews: No reviews yet — be the first.

errorBoundary.title: Couldn't load this extension
errorBoundary.body: We hit a snag fetching this extension. This is usually temporary — try again in a moment.

search.placeholder: Search skills, MCP servers, slash commands…

cliAuth.title: Authorize CLI
cliAuth.subtitle: Enter the code shown in your terminal to connect the AgentCenter CLI to your account.
cliAuth.success: CLI authorized! You can close this window and return to your terminal.
cliAuth.errorInvalid: Invalid or expired code. Please run agentcenter login again.
cliAuth.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
cliAuth.signInRequired: You must be signed in to authorize the CLI.

signIn.title: Sign in
signIn.subtitle: Welcome back to AgentCenter
signIn.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

signUp.title: Create account
signUp.subtitle: Join AgentCenter
signUp.name: Name
signUp.errorExists: An account with this email already exists.
signUp.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

onboard.title: Pick your department
onboard.subtitle: This lets AgentCenter surface extensions relevant to your team. You can change it later in settings.

comingSoon.title: Coming soon
comingSoon.body: This section is in the works — we'll surface it here once it ships.

emptyPublished.title: Nothing published yet
emptyPublished.body: Bundle your skill, MCP server, slash command, or plugin and share it with your team.

emptyInstalled.title: Nothing installed yet
emptyInstalled.body: Browse the marketplace and install your first extension to see it here.

errors.generic: We couldn't save your profile. Please try again.

dashboard.title: My Extensions
dashboard.empty: Bundle your skill, MCP server, slash command, or plugin and share it with your team.

errorBoundary.title: Couldn't load this page
errorBoundary.body: We hit a snag rendering the publish flow. This is usually temporary — try again in a moment.

discard.confirm: Discard "{name}"? This permanently deletes the draft and any uploaded bundle metadata.
discard.error_not_discardable: This extension is published and can't be discarded.
discard.error_fallback: Couldn't discard the draft. Please try again.

wizard.title: Publish an extension
wizard.subtitle: Share your skill, MCP server, slash command, or plugin with your team or the world.
wizard.basicsDesc: What is it and where does it live?
wizard.listingDesc: How it appears in the marketplace.
wizard.successReviewBody: We'll email you when admin review is complete.

scope.label: Scope
scope.orgDesc: Visible to your org. Requires admin review.

basics.name: Extension name
basics.nameHint: Shown on cards and the detail page. Keep it short.
basics.slugHint: Lowercase, hyphenated. Used in URLs and CLI installs.
basics.summaryPlaceholder: What does it do, in 80 characters or less?

source.methodLabel: How would you like to provide your bundle?
source.gitDesc: We'll fetch and validate it for you.
source.gitDeferred: Git source publishing isn't wired up yet — use Zip or the CLI for now.
source.cliDesc: Run a single command from your terminal.
source.zipHint: Max 50 MB. Must contain a valid manifest.json.

listing.iconHint: Pick a colour. Initial is taken from the extension name.
listing.tagsHint: 5–8 tags help discovery. Pick from existing or create new.
listing.tagsPlaceholder: Add a tag and press Enter
listing.tagsLimitReached: Maximum reached — remove a tag to add another
listing.readmeHint: Markdown. Shown on the detail page.
listing.readmePlaceholder:
# My Extension

Markdown supported. Describe features, examples, requirements…

permissions.label: Required permissions
permissions.hint: Be honest — users will see this before installing.

review.intro: Almost done. Review your listing below before submitting.
review.statusReview: Pending admin review — typically within 1 business day
review.terms: By publishing you agree to the AgentCenter Publisher Terms.

preview.placeholderSummary: Your one-line description will appear here.

errors.unauthenticated: Please sign in again to continue.
errors.invalid_input: Some fields look invalid — please double-check and try again.
errors.slug_taken: That slug is already taken — choose another.
errors.version_taken: A version with this number has already been published. Bump the version and try again.
errors.unique_conflict: Some of these details conflict with an existing record. Please review and try again.
errors.invalid_dept: The selected department doesn't exist anymore. Please pick a different one.
errors.invalid_tag: One of the selected tags is no longer available. Remove it and try again.
errors.org_missing: Your workspace isn't fully set up yet. Contact an administrator.
errors.invalid_reference: A referenced item is missing. Please refresh and try again.
errors.missing_required: A required field is missing. Please review the form.
errors.no_bundle: Upload a bundle file before submitting.
errors.version_not_editable: This draft can't be edited anymore — it's already under review or beyond. Refresh the page to see the latest status.
errors.version_not_submittable: This version can't be submitted right now — it may already be under review or have been published. Refresh the page and check the status.
errors.scan_queue_unavailable: Couldn't queue the bundle scan. The review service is temporarily unavailable — please try again in a moment.
errors.db_error: We couldn't save your extension right now. Please try again in a moment.
errors.fallback: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.uploadSign: Couldn't get an upload URL. Please try again.
errors.uploadFailed: The upload didn't finish. Check your connection and try again.
